studio-classic.description: Dark gradient backdrop, 3-point lighting, blazer + gray crew
studio-classic.prompt:
Transform this selfie into a professional LinkedIn studio headshot photograph.

CRITICAL RULES:
- Keep the person's EXACT face, features, bone structure, and expression UNCHANGED
- Keep the same genuine smile and eye crinkle — do NOT alter facial features AT ALL
- Keep the exact same hair style and color as shown
- This must look unmistakably like the SAME person in the original photo

CHANGES TO MAKE:
- Replace the plain wall background with a smooth, soft dark charcoal-to-navy gradient studio backdrop
- Add professional three-point studio lighting: key light from upper-left creating soft directional light on the face, fill light softening shadows on the right, subtle hair/rim light separating the subject from the background
- Replace the casual clothing with a well-fitted dark navy blazer over a clean light gray crew neck
- Subtle professional-grade skin retouching: even out skin tone slightly, reduce any harsh shadows, but keep skin texture NATURAL (no plastic/airbrushed look)
- Frame as a proper head-and-shoulders composition, centered
- The result should look like an actual high-end studio photograph taken with a 85mm portrait lens at f/2.8 — shallow depth of field on the background

STYLE: Photorealistic professional headshot. NOT an illustration, NOT a painting, NOT stylized. A real photograph with professional studio lighting and post-processing. Think Apple executive headshot or LinkedIn Top Voice profile photo quality.

studio-warm.description: Warm tones, Rembrandt lighting, suit + white shirt
studio-warm.prompt:
Transform this selfie into a professional LinkedIn studio headshot photograph with warm, approachable lighting.

CRITICAL RULES:
- Keep the person's EXACT face, features, bone structure, and expression UNCHANGED
- Keep the same genuine warm smile — this is the person's best feature, do NOT alter it
- Keep the exact same hair style and color as shown
- This must be unmistakably recognizable as the SAME person

CHANGES TO MAKE:
- Replace background with a soft warm-toned studio backdrop — subtle warm gray gradient
- Use warm, flattering portrait lighting: soft key light from the front-left (Rembrandt style), gentle fill, warm rim light creating a slight golden glow on the hair edges
- Replace the casual clothing with a sharp dark navy suit jacket over a clean white dress shirt (no tie — modern tech executive look)
- Natural skin enhancement: slightly warm up the skin tones to match golden-hour warmth, even complexion, but keep all natural texture and character
- Professional head-and-shoulders framing
- Should look like a real photograph shot with natural + studio hybrid lighting — warm and inviting but still polished

STYLE: High-end professional photograph with warm color grading. Think CEO headshot for a tech startup landing page — approachable yet authoritative. Photorealistic, NOT illustration.

editorial.description: Blurred office bokeh, cinematic lighting, charcoal blazer + black crew
editorial.prompt:
Transform this selfie into an editorial-quality professional headshot suitable for LinkedIn and press kits.

CRITICAL RULES:
- Preserve the person's EXACT face, features, and genuine smile UNCHANGED
- The result MUST be instantly recognizable as the same person in the original photo
- Keep the natural hair style and texture exactly as shown

CHANGES TO MAKE:
- Replace background with a rich, deep out-of-focus environment — think blurred office bokeh or architectural elements in soft navy/charcoal tones
- Professional editorial lighting: slightly dramatic with a strong key light from the left creating defined but flattering shadows, subtle kicker light on the right edge
- Replace clothing with a fitted dark charcoal blazer over a black crew neck — sleek modern professional look
- Minimal retouching: sharpen eyes slightly, even skin tone, enhance the natural catchlights in the eyes, but KEEP the skin looking real and textured
- Composition: slightly off-center, shallow depth of field, editorial magazine quality
- Color grade: slightly desaturated with lifted blacks — modern editorial look

STYLE: Magazine editorial portrait. Think Bloomberg Businessweek profile shot or Wired magazine feature photo. Photorealistic, cinematic quality. NOT an illustration.

outdoor-natural.description: Golden-hour warmth, soft outdoor bokeh, natural casual-pro
outdoor-natural.prompt:
Transform this selfie into a professional outdoor headshot with natural golden-hour lighting.

CRITICAL RULES:
- Keep the person's EXACT face, features, bone structure, and expression UNCHANGED
- Keep the same genuine smile and natural expression
- Keep the exact same hair style and color as shown
- This must be unmistakably the SAME person

CHANGES TO MAKE:
- Replace background with a soft, out-of-focus natural outdoor scene — warm bokeh of trees, greenery, or a park setting with golden-hour sunlight filtering through
- Natural golden-hour lighting: warm directional sunlight from the side creating a soft glow on the face and hair, no harsh shadows
- Keep or replace clothing with a smart casual look — well-fitted henley or clean polo in a muted earth tone
- Natural skin: warm up tones to match the golden-hour environment, keep all natural texture
- Head-and-shoulders framing, slightly off-center
- Color grade: warm, rich, slightly lifted shadows — think lifestyle brand photography

STYLE: High-end outdoor lifestyle portrait. Think headshot for a nature-tech brand or outdoor startup. Photorealistic, warm, inviting. The kind of photo that looks effortlessly natural but was clearly shot by a professional photographer.

startup-ceo.prompt:
Transform this selfie into a modern tech founder headshot.

CRITICAL RULES:
- Keep the person's EXACT face, features, bone structure, and expression UNCHANGED
- Keep the same genuine smile — approachable confidence is key
- Keep the exact same hair style and color as shown
- This must be unmistakably the SAME person

CHANGES TO MAKE:
- Replace background with a modern, minimalist tech office environment — clean white or light gray wall with subtle architectural detail, slightly out of focus
- Clean, bright lighting: soft even illumination suggesting a modern well-lit space, subtle directional light from the left for depth
- Replace clothing with a clean black crew neck or quarter-zip — the Silicon Valley founder uniform
- Natural skin: clean, even, healthy-looking but completely natural
- Slightly wider framing than a traditional headshot — more shoulders visible, suggesting confidence and presence
- Color grade: clean, neutral with slight cool undertones — modern and precise

STYLE: Modern tech founder headshot. Think Y Combinator partner page or TechCrunch feature photo. Professional but deliberately non-corporate. Clean, confident, approachable.

pixar.prompt:
Transform this photo into a high-quality Pixar/Disney 3D animated character portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's EXACT face shape, hair style, smile, and expression. This must be instantly recognizable as the same person — just in 3D animation style.

STYLE:
- Pixar/Disney 3D animation quality — smooth subsurface scattering skin, slightly exaggerated proportions
- Slightly larger eyes with more expressive catchlights, but keep the eye color
- Keep the exact hair style — render with stylized 3D hair strands
- The genuine warm smile should be the focal point — slightly exaggerate the warmth
- Keep the clothing, rendered in the 3D style
- Soft, cinematic lighting matching the original photo's direction
- Keep or enhance the background in Pixar style — warm, inviting
- Think: if this person were a character in a Pixar movie
- High detail, production-quality 3D render — NOT cheap or low-poly

comic-pop.description: Bold comic book / pop art with halftone dots
comic-pop.prompt:
Transform this photo into a bold comic book / pop art style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable features — face shape, hair, jawline, and smile. Must be clearly the same person.

STYLE:
- Bold comic book illustration style — clean ink lines, strong confident strokes
- Flat color blocks with halftone dot shading patterns (Ben-Day dots)
- Limited but punchy color palette: deep teals, warm skin tones, bold navy for clothing, pop of warm color in the background
- Strong black outlines defining features — slightly thicker on the outer contour, thinner for internal detail
- Keep the hair with dynamic comic-book flow and highlights
- The smile should be bold and charismatic — slightly larger than life
- Background: graphic color blocks or subtle halftone gradient — think modern Marvel character portrait meets pop art
- High quality illustration — think Alex Ross meets modern Marvel character design, NOT cheap clip art

watercolor.description: Loose watercolor painting with soft washes and visible brush texture
watercolor.prompt:
Transform this photo into a beautiful watercolor portrait painting.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable features — face shape, hair, expression. Must be clearly the same person rendered in watercolor.

STYLE:
- Traditional watercolor painting technique — visible wet-on-wet washes, soft color bleeds, paper texture
- Loose, flowing brushwork that suggests rather than defines — especially at the edges of hair and shoulders
- Color palette: warm skin tones with subtle rose and ochre washes, cool blue-gray shadows
- The face should be the most detailed area — more definition in the eyes and smile
- Hair rendered with flowing wet brush strokes, letting colors bleed naturally
- Background: abstract washes of cool blues and warm grays, letting the white of the paper show through
- Clothing suggested with minimal strokes — dark washes implying the blazer shape
- Should look like it was painted by a skilled watercolorist, not a digital filter
- Think: John Singer Sargent watercolor portrait quality

oil-painting.description: Classical oil painting with rich impasto texture
oil-painting.prompt:
Transform this photo into a classical oil painting portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable features — face shape, hair, expression. Must be clearly the same person rendered as an oil painting.

STYLE:
- Rich, classical oil painting technique — visible brushstrokes with impasto texture
- Warm, Rembrandt-inspired lighting with deep chiaroscuro shadows
- Color palette: rich umber and sienna skin tones, deep burnt orange highlights, dark earth-toned background
- The face rendered with careful attention — smooth blended skin with visible directional brushwork
- Hair painted with thick, confident strokes showing volume and movement
- Background: dark, atmospheric, suggesting depth — classical portrait backdrop
- Clothing rendered with broad confident strokes — dark fabric with subtle color variation
- Canvas texture should be visible throughout
- Should look like a portrait hanging in a gallery — think Old Masters meets contemporary realism

flat-vector.description: Clean flat vector illustration, modern tech company style
flat-vector.prompt:
Transform this photo into a clean, modern flat vector illustration.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable features — face shape, hair style, smile. Must be clearly the same person in a minimalist vector style.

STYLE:
- Clean flat vector illustration — no gradients, pure flat color shapes
- Limited color palette: 8-10 colors maximum, each a solid flat fill
- Simple geometric shapes defining features — circles, ovals, clean curves
- No outlines or very thin subtle outlines in a slightly darker shade
- Hair as a single solid shape with 1-2 highlight shapes layered on top
- Eyes simplified to basic shapes but keeping the warm expression
- Smile simplified but recognizable — clean curved line
- Background: single solid color or simple two-tone geometric split
- Clothing as simple flat shapes — dark solid for blazer
- Think: Notion avatar, Slack profile illustration, or modern SaaS company "About Us" page
- Should look professionally designed, not auto-traced

caricature.prompt:
Transform this photo into a professional caricature portrait.

CRITICAL: This must be RECOGNIZABLE as the same person — exaggerate distinctive features but don't lose the likeness.

STYLE:
- Professional editorial caricature — think New Yorker or Vanity Fair style
- Identify and exaggerate the most distinctive features: jawline, smile, hair texture
- Head slightly larger than body proportions — classic caricature ratio
- Keep the warm genuine smile but make it even more prominent
- Hair exaggerated for volume and wave — make it a defining feature
- Clean, confident linework with watercolor or digital color fills
- Warm, flattering color palette — this should be a celebration of the person's features, not mockery
- Background: simple, clean — let the caricature be the focus
- Professional quality — the kind of caricature you'd commission at a high-end event
- Should be fun and charming, never mean-spirited

chibi.description: Cute chibi/SD style with oversized head and tiny body
chibi.prompt:
Transform this photo into an adorable chibi (super-deformed) character portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable features — hair color/style, eye color, smile. Must be clearly inspired by the same person.

STYLE:
- Classic chibi proportions: oversized head (about 1:1 or 1:2 head-to-body ratio), tiny cute body
- Large, round, sparkly eyes with multiple highlight reflections — keep the eye color
- Hair simplified but keeping the distinctive swept-back wavy style — slightly exaggerated volume
- Big, happy smile taking up most of the lower face — maximum cute energy
- Tiny hands and feet, simplified body
- Keep the clothing but miniaturized — tiny blazer and crew neck
- Soft, warm pastel-influenced color palette
- Clean linework with soft cel-shading
- Background: simple solid color or soft gradient with optional sparkle/star accents
- Should look like a professional chibi commission — cute, polished, high quality

ghibli.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Studio Ghibli style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's EXACT face shape, hair style, smile, and expression. This must be instantly recognizable as the same person in Ghibli style.

STYLE:
- Studio Ghibli / Hayao Miyazaki character design quality
- Soft, painterly color palette with warm earth tones and muted pastels
- Clean, rounded linework with gentle facial features
- Large but proportionate eyes (not exaggerated like shojo) — keep the brown iris color
- Hand-painted watercolor texture in shading — soft washes of color for shadows
- Hair rendered with flowing, natural strokes — keep the wavy swept-back style
- Warm, diffused natural lighting as if outdoors on a gentle day
- Background: soft watercolor nature elements — greenery, sky, dappled light
- Keep the clothing, rendered in Ghibli's grounded, realistic clothing style
- The expression should feel warm, genuine, and full of life — Ghibli characters radiate humanity
- Whimsical and serene atmosphere

shinkai.description: Dramatic skies, golden hour, lens flares (Your Name)
shinkai.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Makoto Shinkai anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable features — face shape, jawline, hair style, and warm smile. This must clearly be the same person rendered in anime style.

STYLE:
- Clean anime illustration style — Makoto Shinkai film quality (Your Name, Weathering With You)
- Hyper-detailed photorealistic background paired with softer anime-style character
- Expressive anime eyes but keep them proportional and brown — not oversized
- Keep the exact wavy hair swept back, rendered with flowing anime hair detail and highlights
- Smooth gradient rendering in hair and eyes — Shinkai's signature technique
- The warm genuine smile should carry through — slightly stylized but recognizable
- Keep the clothing — blazer and crew neck
- Transform the background into a beautiful anime-style blurred cityscape with warm evening light and subtle lens flares
- Rich, vibrant color palette with signature anime color grading — deep blues, warm skin tones
- Dramatic volumetric clouds or golden-hour sky visible in background
- Clean linework with soft cel-shading and gradient shadows
- Professional anime quality — character portrait from a major anime film, not fan art

jjk.description: Dark, neon cursed energy accents (Jujutsu Kaisen)
jjk.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Jujutsu Kaisen anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's EXACT face shape, hair style, and expression. Must be recognizable as the same person in JJK style.

STYLE:
- MAPPA studio Jujutsu Kaisen aesthetic
- Sharp, angular character design with heavy dark outlines
- Color palette: deep blues, purples, and blacks with high-contrast cursed energy effects
- Bright cyan and magenta energy accents — subtle cursed energy wisps around the edges
- Detailed eye rendering with intensity — keep brown iris but add JJK's characteristic sharpness
- Hair rendered with angular precision, dark shadows between strands
- Keep the clothing — dark blazer works perfectly for JJK aesthetic
- Background: dark, atmospheric with subtle cursed energy particles floating
- Modern shonen character design — cool, sophisticated, powerful
- Dramatic high-contrast lighting with deep shadows
- Should read as a character who belongs in the JJK universe

demon-slayer.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Demon Slayer (Kimetsu no Yaiba) anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's EXACT face shape, hair style, and smile. Must be recognizable as the same person.

STYLE:
- Ufotable studio quality — polished, cinematic anime
- Vibrant, highly saturated color palette
- Soft facial features with detailed gradient-colored eye rendering
- Digital particle effects floating in the scene — subtle glowing motes of light
- Hair with flowing anime detail, catching light with warm highlights
- Replace or overlay clothing with a patterned haori (traditional Japanese jacket) over the existing outfit — geometric pattern in complementary colors
- Background: atmospheric with subtle breathing technique effects — swirling colored wisps (water blue or flame orange)
- Warm skin tones with Ufotable's characteristic smooth shading
- Cinematic, polished finish with rich depth
- The person should look like a Demon Slayer Corps member at rest — powerful but approachable

chainsaw-man.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Chainsaw Man anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's EXACT face shape, hair style, and expression. Must be recognizable. Chainsaw Man characters have realistic proportions.

STYLE:
- MAPPA's Chainsaw Man adaptation aesthetic — grungier, more cinematic than typical anime
- Muted, desaturated color palette with sudden bursts of red and orange
- Realistic body proportions — NOT exaggerated anime proportions
- Cinematographic framing influenced by Western filmmaking
- Raw, slightly rough character rendering — not over-polished
- Hair with slightly messy, lived-in quality
- Keep the clothing — dark tones work perfectly
- Background: dark urban atmosphere with muted city tones, possibly rain or wet surfaces
- Subtle blood-red accent somewhere in the composition (could be lighting, a reflection, clothing detail)
- The overall feel should be cinematic thriller, not typical anime cheerfulness
- Tatsuki Fujimoto's visceral energy translated through MAPPA's lens

spy-x-family.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Spy x Family anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable features — face shape, hair, smile. The smile is key — Spy x Family characters are highly expressive.

STYLE:
- Wit Studio / CloverWorks Spy x Family aesthetic
- Clean, elegant linework with a polished commercial feel
- Rounded, approachable character features
- Crisp, bright color palette — greens, pinks, cream tones
- Highly dynamic and expressive facial rendering — the smile should be charming and animated
- Hair rendered with clean, flowing lines and warm highlights
- Replace or style clothing with a retro-European spy aesthetic — think sharp suit with vintage charm, or a clean turtleneck
- Background: elegant, slightly retro interior or European cityscape — warm and inviting
- Warm, inviting lighting throughout
- The character should exude charm and sophistication — think Loid Forger's polished elegance

aot.prompt:
Transform this photo into an Attack on Titan anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's EXACT face shape, hair style, and features. Must be recognizable. Expression can shift slightly toward determined/serious.

STYLE:
- Wit Studio / MAPPA Attack on Titan aesthetic
- Dark, dramatic color palette dominated by grays, browns, and blood reds
- Detailed, somewhat realistic facial proportions — AoT characters look more grounded than typical anime
- Intense, determined expression — the smile can be more subtle, suggesting quiet confidence
- Heavy shadow work and dramatic lighting — strong directional light
- Hair rendered with realistic weight and texture
- Replace clothing with Survey Corps elements — the iconic green hooded cloak with Wings of Freedom insignia, or military jacket with leather harness straps visible
- Background: dramatic sky, possibly sunset or storm clouds, suggesting the walls or a vast landscape
- Weathered, battle-hardened quality to the overall rendering
- Serious, cinematic atmosphere — this person looks like a Survey Corps veteran

jojo.prompt:
Transform this photo into a JoJo's Bizarre Adventure anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable face shape, hair, and features. JoJo style dramatically stylizes but the person must still be recognizable.

STYLE:
- Hirohiko Araki's JoJo character design — fashion-forward, flamboyant, dramatic
- Vibrant, almost psychedelic color palette with bold color shifts — think contrasting purples, golds, teals
- Heavy dramatic shading with intense color contrast and sharp shadow edges
- Muscular, detailed anatomy with slightly elongated proportions (later parts style)
- A dramatic JoJo pose — confident, theatrical body language even in a portrait crop
- Hair with dramatic volume and flow — stylized but recognizable
- Fashion-forward clothing: replace or stylize the blazer into something more flamboyant — think high fashion meets battle-ready
- Background: bold graphic elements, possibly with kanji or onomatopoeia effects, color-shifting atmosphere
- Menacing, confident expression — the smile becomes a knowing smirk
- Renaissance art-influenced composition with modern manga energy
- This should SCREAM JoJo from a thumbnail

edgerunners.description: Neon glow, punk, Studio Trigger energy (Cyberpunk: Edgerunners)
edgerunners.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Cyberpunk: Edgerunners (Studio Trigger) anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's face shape, hair style, and features recognizable. The cyberpunk elements should enhance, not replace.

STYLE:
- Studio Trigger's hyperkinetic Edgerunners aesthetic
- Neon-drenched color palette with constant glow effects — hot pinks, electric blues, toxic greens
- Sharp angular character design with bold thick outlines
- Exaggerated proportions with punk energy
- Hair with neon-tinted highlights or reflections from city lights
- Add subtle cyberpunk enhancements: maybe a glowing circuit line on the neck, neon-reflecting eyes, or tech-enhanced clothing details
- Replace clothing with cyberpunk elements — tech-enhanced jacket, LED accents, collar electronics
- Background: dark Night City atmosphere with neon signs, holographic advertisements bleeding color
- Bright, flashy composition against a dark urban environment
- Frenetic visual energy — every element saturated and glowing
- The person should look like they belong in Night City

promare.description: Geometric shading, neon primaries, poster art
promare.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Promare (Studio Trigger) anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable face shape and features. Promare's style is extremely geometric but the likeness must be clear.

STYLE:
- Promare's unique flat geometric shading — triangular shapes instead of traditional smooth gradients
- Extremely bold neon primary color palette: hot pink, electric blue, lime green against dark backgrounds
- Characters rendered with thick outlines and angular, almost low-poly-looking features
- Hard geometric shapes for all shading — no soft gradients, everything is crisp triangular facets
- Hair rendered as bold geometric shapes with neon color accents
- Keep or stylize clothing with geometric rendering — flat planes of dark color
- Background: bold graphic blocks of neon color, possibly with geometric fire/ice effects
- The entire composition should look like a living graphic design poster
- Maximum visual impact — this style is designed to grab attention
- Hiroyuki Imaishi's visual style at its most extreme

dbz.description: Sharp angular, spiky hair, bold outlines (Dragon Ball Z)
dbz.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Dragon Ball Z anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable features — face shape, eye color, smile. The DBZ style is iconic but the person must be identifiable.

STYLE:
- Akira Toriyama's Dragon Ball character design
- Sharp, angular facial features with defined jawline
- Bold, confident linework with thick clean outlines
- Simple but extremely recognizable eye shapes — keep the eye color
- Hair stylized with more volume and spiky energy — keep the general swept-back shape but add DBZ drama
- Strong cel-shading with high value contrast — sharp shadow edges
- Vibrant, saturated color palette
- Keep the clothing but rendered in DBZ's clean, bold style
- Background: simple gradient or dramatic sky — could suggest a power-up scene
- Confident, determined expression — the smile becomes a battle-ready grin
- The overall feel should be powerful and energetic — classic shonen protagonist energy
- Production quality: think Dragon Ball Super key visual, not fan-made

sailor-moon.description: Sparkles, large eyes, pastels, romantic 90s shojo
sailor-moon.prompt:
Transform this photo into a 90s Sailor Moon / shojo anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable features — face shape, hair color, expression. The shojo style dramatically changes eyes and proportions but the person should still be identifiable.

STYLE:
- Classic 90s shojo manga aesthetic — Sailor Moon, Cardcaptor Sakura era
- Extra-large emotive eyes with multiple highlight layers and star/sparkle reflections
- Fine, delicate linework throughout
- Soft pastel color palette emphasizing pinks, lavenders, golds, and soft blues
- Hair rendered with flowing, glamorous volume — keep the color and general style but add shojo drama
- Flowers, sparkles, and celestial motifs scattered in the background
- Slightly elongated, elegant proportions
- The smile should be warm and sparkling — classic shojo charm
- Background: dreamy gradient with floating flower petals, sparkles, and soft light effects
- Keep clothing but potentially add elegant details — a brooch, refined collar
- Romantic, dreamy atmosphere — everything should shimmer
- Should look like a character from a beloved 90s anime

akira.description: Cyberpunk, gritty realism, neon on dark (1988)
akira.prompt:
Transform this photo into an Akira (1988) anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's EXACT features — Akira uses realistic proportions, so the likeness should be very close. Expression can be more serious/intense.

STYLE:
- Katsuhiro Otomo's Akira character design — NOT typical 'anime eyes'
- Hyper-detailed, gritty linework with realistic adult proportions
- Neon color palette against dark urban backgrounds — city lights reflecting on the face
- Detailed rendering of facial features — more realistic than most anime styles
- Hair rendered with gritty, realistic detail
- Clothing: leather jacket or dark technical wear — cyberpunk Neo-Tokyo aesthetic
- Background: dark urban cyberpunk cityscape, neon signs, light bloom effects
- Moody, dramatic lighting — strong side-light suggesting neon city glow
- A mature, cinematic framing style — this is NOT cute or cheerful
- Groundbreaking use of light bloom and reflective surfaces
- Should feel dangerous and electric — the energy of Neo-Tokyo at night

redline.description: Retro-futuristic rockabilly, insane color, thick outlines
redline.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Redline (2009) anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person recognizable despite the extreme stylization. Redline is one of the most stylized anime — focus on keeping the face shape and smile.

STYLE:
- Redline's hyper-stylized Madhouse aesthetic — extreme and bold
- Exaggerated proportions: strong angular jaw, dramatic features
- Thick, bold, almost comic-book-like outlines
- Insanely vibrant, fully saturated color palette — every color turned to 11
- Retro-futuristic rockabilly aesthetic — think 50s hot-rod culture meets space racing
- Hair styled with maximum drama and volume — exaggerated swept-back with pompadour energy
- Hand-drawn cel animation quality — visible stroke confidence
- Keep or replace clothing with retro-futuristic elements — leather racing jacket, vintage-future fashion
- Background: speed lines, neon, or retro-futuristic environment
- High energy, dynamic composition — nothing static
- Should feel like this person is about to win the most dangerous race in the galaxy

mob-psycho.description: Raw sketchy linework, psychic energy bursts
mob-psycho.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Mob Psycho 100 anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's recognizable features. Mob Psycho uses deliberately simple character faces — simplify but keep the likeness.

STYLE:
- ONE's manga aesthetic adapted by Bones studio
- Deliberately rough, sketch-like linework that looks raw but purposeful
- Simple character face design — reduced detail that emphasizes expression over beauty
- Variable line weight ranging from thin scratchy lines to thick bold strokes
- Muted base color palette for the character
- BUT: add psychic energy effects in the background — neon blues and purples bursting outward
- Paint-splatter or watercolor-burst effects suggesting psychic power
- Hair simple but with occasional strands catching psychic glow
- Keep clothing simple and grounded — Mob Psycho characters dress plainly
- Background: transitioning from mundane to psychedelic — reality breaking down at the edges
- The contrast between simple character and explosive energy effects is the signature look
- Expression: calm and gentle despite the chaos — that's Mob's whole thing

ping-pong.description: Lo-fi, emotionally raw, Masaaki Yuasa indie art
ping-pong.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Ping Pong the Animation (Masaaki Yuasa) anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: This style deliberately distorts proportions for emotional expression. Keep the person's general likeness and key features, but embrace the distortion.

STYLE:
- Masaaki Yuasa's distinctive animation aesthetic
- Sketchy, loose linework that looks like rough pencil drawings — raw and intimate
- Muted pastel color palette with sudden bursts of expressive color
- Deformed, non-conventional character proportions — prioritize emotion over beauty
- Variable line weight: some areas detailed, others barely suggested
- Watercolor-like color washes that bleed beyond the lines
- Hair as loose, expressive strokes — suggesting rather than defining
- Keep clothing simple — minimal detail, suggested with broad strokes
- Background: abstract color washes or simple geometric shapes
- The portrait should communicate personality and inner life through visual distortion
- Lo-fi indie animation quality — intimate, raw, personal
- This is the most artistically bold option — it says 'I appreciate art beyond the mainstream'

mononoke-tv.description: Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, kabuki patterns (2007 TV)
mononoke-tv.prompt:
Transform this photo into the Mononoke (2007 TV series) anime style.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's general face shape and features recognizable. This style is extremely decorative — the likeness lives in the overall impression.

STYLE:
- Art style drawn from traditional Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock prints and kabuki theater
- Vivid, intricate patterns filling every surface — fabric, background, even skin has subtle patterning
- Bold, bright colors with a flat, paper-like quality
- Character looks like they were painted on a traditional Japanese scroll
- Facial features simplified to ukiyo-e conventions: angular eyes, defined brows, subtle expression
- Hair rendered as flowing decorative shapes with pattern details
- Clothing transformed into elaborate patterned kimono or traditional garment — rich with geometric and floral motifs
- Background: dense decorative patterns, possibly overlapping layers of traditional Japanese motifs
- Slight horror-infused psychedelic atmosphere — beautiful but unsettling
- Every inch of the canvas should be filled with intricate detail
- This should look like a museum-quality piece of Japanese decorative art

tatami-galaxy.description: Pop-art chaos, flat cutouts, geometric (Masaaki Yuasa)
tatami-galaxy.prompt:
Transform this photo into The Tatami Galaxy anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's general silhouette and key features. This style is extremely abstract — the likeness is conveyed through overall impression, not detail.

STYLE:
- Masaaki Yuasa's Tatami Galaxy aesthetic — pure visual chaos channeled into design
- Pop-art colors clashing boldly — unexpected color combinations that shouldn't work but do
- Character design deliberately flat and simple, almost like paper cutouts
- Placed against a wildly complex, patterned background of geometric shapes
- Ultra-flat rendering with no depth cues on the character
- Hair as a single bold shape — solid color, sharp edges
- Face simplified to essential features: dot eyes, simple line mouth, minimal nose
- Clothing as flat graphic shapes — bold solid colors
- Background: kaleidoscopic geometric patterns, possibly incorporating motifs from the original show (tatami mats, hallways, clocks)
- Bold, contrasting colors everywhere — yellows, purples, reds, teals
- This is avant-garde — it should look like an art school experimental piece
- Maximalist background, minimalist character — that's the signature tension

violet-evergarden.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Violet Evergarden (Kyoto Animation) anime style portrait.

CRITICAL: Keep the person's EXACT features — Violet Evergarden characters have detailed, near-realistic rendering so the likeness should be very close.

STYLE:
- Kyoto Animation's highest production quality — the most beautifully animated TV anime ever made
- Incredibly detailed character rendering: meticulous attention to skin texture, fabric folds, hair strand movement
- Soft, luminous lighting that makes every surface glow — light catching on hair, reflecting in eyes
- Delicate, refined facial features with subtle emotional expression
- Detailed eye rendering: multiple layers of color, luminous reflections, visible iris detail
- Hair rendered with individual strand-level detail, catching light at different angles
- Clothing detailed with visible fabric texture — if keeping the blazer, render every seam and fold
- Background: soft, painterly European setting — maybe a sunlit room or garden with volumetric light rays
- Color palette: blues, whites, golds with a European historical warmth
- Painterly light effects throughout — lens-like bloom on highlights
- This should look like the most expensive anime frame ever produced

satoshi-kon.prompt:
Transform this photo into a Satoshi Kon anime style portrait (Paprika / Perfect Blue aesthetic).

CRITICAL: Keep the person's EXACT features — Satoshi Kon uses realistic adult proportions, so this should be a very close likeness.

STYLE:
- Satoshi Kon's mature anime aesthetic — realistic adult proportions, NOT typical anime exaggeration
- Detailed, psychologically complex facial expression — the smile should suggest depth, as if the person has layers beneath the surface
- Dreamlike color treatment: naturalistic base that shifts into surreal, hallucinatory tones at the edges
- Vibrant colors that transition between realistic and psychedelic — reality bending subtly
- Detailed facial rendering capturing psychological nuance — subtle asymmetries, natural skin
- Hair rendered realistically with possible surreal color shifts in the highlights
- Keep clothing grounded and realistic
- Background: starts realistic (an office, a room) but dissolves at the edges into surreal elements — fragmented reality, overlapping images, dream logic
- The portrait should feel like a still frame from a psychological thriller — beautiful but with an undercurrent of unease
- Blending of fantasy and reality within the same frame — Kon's signature technique
